Task description and verifier.py explicit string matching
Task description instructs '2010-12-23' (Y-m-d format) and verifier.py explicitly checks for 'Y-m-d'
Task description instructs '23:00' (24-hour format) and verifier.py explicitly checks for 'H:i'
Task description instructs signature name 'Support Standard' and export_result.sh explicitly queries this name from users_signatures

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions are synthetically generated and explicitly hardcode the expected profile updates. Confirmed that the verifier correctly checks for the target title 'Customer Service Representative', department 'Global Support', phone '(555) 019-9283', date format 'Y-m-d' (corresponding to 2010-12-23), time format 'H:i' (corresponding to 23:00), and signature name 'Support Standard'.
